notes: dsm-firmenich is one of the world's largest science-based nutrition, health, and beauty companies, formed by the merger of DSM and Firmenich in 2023. Their ETERWELL™ YOUTH senolytic active represents a breakthrough in skin longevity science, targeting senescent 'zombie cells' that accumulate with age and drive inflammaging. The Alpaflor® alpine plant biotechnology platform produces clinically validated biotech extracts with exceptional sustainability credentials, making dsm-firmenich a top-tier SKIN-TWIN reference for next-generation anti-aging biotech actives.
